name: Members Community
description_short: Members Community Credit Union (MCCU) is a not-for-profit, member-owned credit union serving Muscatine and surrounding communities with low-interest loans, savings accounts, and personalized financial services.
description_long:
Members Community Credit Union (MCCU) is a locally-rooted credit union that has been serving the Muscatine area and surrounding counties. According to their website, they are the only financial institution whose roots started in Muscatine and remain exclusively located there. As a not-for-profit institution, MCCU operates under the credit union model where earnings are returned to members rather than distributed to shareholders. The organization is federally insured through the National Credit Union Administration (NCUA), providing the same deposit protection as traditional banks.

MCCU offers a comprehensive range of financial products including personal checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), auto loans, mortgages, home improvement loans, and other consumer lending products. They advertise competitive rates, including examples such as 2.25% APY on checking accounts, 4.99% APR on 60-month auto loans, and 3.90% APY on 6-month CDs. The credit union emphasizes low fees, personalized service, and an easy online and mobile banking platform called eBranch that enables balance checks, fund transfers, check deposits, and bill payments.

What distinguishes MCCU is their explicit commitment to community involvement and local decision-making. The website highlights their support for local schools, nonprofits, and community events through donations, sponsorships, and volunteer work. They provide free financial education resources to members and emphasize that banking with them directly contributes to the local community. Their routing number (273975629) and local phone line (563-264-7210) reflect their localized operations. Member testimonials praise their friendly service, quick account setup, and long-term reliability (one member reported banking there since 1976).

MCCU is best suited for residents of Muscatine and surrounding counties seeking personalized, community-focused banking with competitive rates and lower fees than traditional banks. The main caveat is their geographic limitation—they explicitly operate only in Muscatine, making them inaccessible to consumers outside that region. Additionally, as a smaller credit union, their product offerings and technology capabilities may be more limited than larger national institutions, though their website does not provide detailed information about account minimums, membership eligibility restrictions, or specific limitations.
services: Personal checking accounts (Checking 2.0 product at 2.25% APY)
Personal savings accounts with competitive interest rates
Certificates of deposit (6-month CDs at 3.90% APY)
Mortgage loans for home purchase and home improvements
Online and mobile banking platform (eBranch) with bill pay, fund transfers, and check deposit
pros: Low-interest rates on loans (4.99% APR on 60-month auto loans, competitive mortgage rates)
Fewer fees compared to traditional banks with explicit commitment to transparent, affordable services
Not-for-profit structure returns earnings to members as lower loan rates, higher savings rates, and reduced fees
Locally-owned and operated exclusively in Muscatine with local decision-making authority
Active community outreach supporting local schools, nonprofits, and community events
Federal NCUA insurance provides same deposit protection as FDIC-insured banks
Digital banking platform (eBranch) offering 24/7 access to accounts, transfers, check deposits, and bill pay
cons: Geographic limitation: exclusively serves Muscatine and surrounding counties only—no other branch locations or service areas
Limited information about membership eligibility requirements and account minimums on website
As a smaller credit union, likely offers fewer advanced digital features and products compared to national banks or larger credit unions
No mention of credit card products, investment services, or business banking options
Limited hours and service availability compared to 24/7 national banks
best_for: Muscatine residents and surrounding county residents seeking personalized, community-focused banking
Local borrowers looking for competitive auto loans and mortgages with low interest rates
Consumers who prioritize community investment and want their banking to support local nonprofits and schools
Long-term savers and account holders who value stable, local financial institutions and member relationships
diagnosis: MCCU is best for Muscatine-area residents seeking a personalized, community-focused credit union with competitive rates and low fees. The primary limitation is strict geographic availability—they only serve Muscatine and surrounding counties, making them inaccessible for consumers outside this region who cannot establish membership eligibility.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Members Community — Muscatine, IA Credit Union | CreditDoc
meta_description: Members Community — NCUA-insured credit union in Muscatine, IA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
